name: hcportal_getLoginHistory
description: Returns login history for a specified user over the last 365 days. Includes login timestamps, app versions, device types, and geolocation data, ordered most recent first. Uses READ UNCOMMITTED isolation for performance.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID to retrieve login history for. Validated as non-null. Used in main query WHERE clause.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: LoginHistoryResult
rowsets.description: Login history records for the specified user over the last 365 days, ordered by loginDate descending. Empty rowset if no matching records found.

columns.name: loginDate
columns.description: Timestamp of the login from HC.LaunchAndLogin.LoginDate

columns.name: systemVersion
columns.description: Device OS version from HC.LaunchAndLogin.SystemVersion. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: latitude
columns.description: City latitude from HC.City (LEFT JOIN on CityId). COALESCE to 0.0 if no city found.

columns.name: longitude
columns.description: City longitude from HC.City (LEFT JOIN on CityId). COALESCE to 0.0 if no city found.

columns.name: locationName
columns.description: Full city name from HC.City.CityFullName (LEFT JOIN on CityId). COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
